# Daniel Rakušan — Junior Python Backend Developer

> Portfolio and live Python demo — danielrakusan.cz

Daniel Rakušan is a junior Python backend developer based in Prague, Czech Republic, looking for his first IT role. He transitioned from IT support into software development and is actively building projects in Python, Django, FastAPI, and SQLite.

## Contact
- Email: rakusan.dev@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/DanielRakusan
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/daniel-rakusan
- Website: https://danielrakusan.cz

## Tech Stack
Python, Django, FastAPI, SQLite, SQL, Git, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Next.js, PostgreSQL, REST API, WebSocket, Web Push API

## AI-Assisted Development
Actively uses Claude Code and an AI-assisted workflow as part of everyday development. Experienced with prompt engineering, AI-driven code review, and automated git workflows.

## Certifications
- **Python programátor BASIC** — state-accredited retraining course, Ministry of Education CR (ref. MSMT-7415/2024-5)
- Django Foundations for Python — Mimo Academy
- Object-Oriented Programming in Python — itnetwork.cz
- Python Fundamentals — itnetwork.cz
- SQLite Databases Step by Step — itnetwork.cz
- + 6 more certificates (HTML5, JavaScript, web design, React)

## Projects (Live Demo)
Interactive Python projects runnable directly in the browser at https://danielrakusan.cz — a real Python backend running on Render.com, with output streamed via WebSocket.

## Availability
Available immediately. Prague or remote.

## Languages
Czech (native), English (professional working proficiency)
